metadata.raw: {"ID":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/id/wsi/2025/1296","TITLE":"The Procurement Act 2023 (Threshold Amounts) (Amendment) (Wales) Regulations 2025 / Rheoliadau Deddf Caffael 2023 (Symiau Trothwy) (Diwygio) (Cymru) 2025","LINK (SELF)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/id/wsi/2025/1296","LINK":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/wsi/2025/1296/made","LINK (XML)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/wsi/2025/1296/made/data.xml","LINK (XML - Cymru)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/wsi/2025/1296/made/welsh/data.xml","LINK (RDF/XML)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/wsi/2025/1296/made/data.rdf","LINK (RDF/XML - Cymru)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/wsi/2025/1296/made/welsh/data.rdf","LINK (AKN)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/wsi/2025/1296/made/data.akn","LINK (AKN - Cymru)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/wsi/2025/1296/made/welsh/data.akn","LINK (HTML snippet)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/wsi/2025/1296/made/data.xht","LINK (HTML snippet - Cymru)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/wsi/2025/1296/made/welsh/data.xht","LINK (HTML5 snippet - Cymru)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/wsi/2025/1296/made/welsh/data.html","LINK (Website (XHTML) Default View)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/wsi/2025/1296/made/data.htm","LINK (Website (XHTML) Default View - Cymru)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/wsi/2025/1296/made/welsh/data.htm","LINK (PDF)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/wsi/2025/1296/made/data.pdf","LINK (PDF - Cymru)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/wsi/2025/1296/made/welsh/data.pdf","LINK (Table of Contents)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/wsi/2025/1296/contents/made","LINK (Table of Contents - Cymru)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/wsi/2025/1296/contents/made/welsh","AUTHOR":"","UPDATED":"2025-12-11T14:27:31Z","PUBLISHED":"2025-12-11T13:42:03.611689Z","DocumentMainType":"WelshStatutoryInstrument","YEAR":"2025","NUMBER":"1296","ISBN":"'9780348397543'","AlternativeNumber":"Category: W; Value: 210","CreationDate":"2025-12-09","SUBJECT":"PUBLIC PROCUREMENT, WALES","CATEGORY":"PUBLIC PROCUREMENT, WALES","SUMMARY":"Following a review of the relevant threshold amounts, these Regulations bring forward amendments to Schedule 1 to the Procurement Act 2023 (“the Act”) by omitting a column in the table set out in Schedule 1. This ensures the thresholds as laid down in the World Trade Organisation’s Agreement on Government Procurement will apply to public contracts for goods, works and services regulated by Welsh Ministers. These amendments will ensure Schedule 1 to the Act reflects Wales’s international trade obligations.","":""}
